TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ariel Lin Ariel Lin u siwkay niza Ariel Lin (1982.10.29) tatayna, nalecuhan i Taywan. 2008 a mihcan nay "mibalakas micepcep 2"maala saka43 Cincung kawlah palaway ngatu tatayna a kawlah, u sakacacay maala nu kanamuhan a palaway. 2011.9 mipalaw tilibi a ngatu"caay kaku maidih tisuwan"singangantu. u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u kawlah niza u nasulitan nu Hulam atu Amilika Ariel Lin is a Taiwanese actress and singer. She rose to fame for her role as Yuan Xiangqin in the Taiwanese drama It Started with a Kiss (2005) and the Chinese fantasy drama The Little Fairy (2006). Lin won Best Actress at the 43rd and 47th Golden Bell Awards for her roles in They Kiss Again (2007) and In Time with You (2011) respectively. (u kamu nu Hulam: śěóšĺĚśô®, .) namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan śěóšĺĚśô®
S.PHON: ari…ôr~…ĺ r~…ĺin ari…ôr~…ĺ r~…ĺin u siwkaj niza ari…ôr~…ĺ r~…ĺin (****.**.**) tatajna, nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i tajwan. **** a mińß ¶an naj "mibar~…ĺakas mi ¶…ôp ¶…ôp *"maar~…ĺa saka** ¶in ¶uŇč kawr~…ĺańß par~…ĺawaj Ňčatu tatajna a kawr~…ĺańß, u saka ¶a ¶aj maar~…ĺa nu kanamuńßan a par~…ĺawaj. ****.* mipar~…ĺaw tir~…ĺibi a Ňčatu" ¶aaj kaku maidińß tisuwan"siŇčaŇčantu. u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u kawr~…ĺańß niza u nasur~…ĺitan nu ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika ari…ôr~…ĺ r~…ĺin is a taiwan…ôs…ô a ¶tr…ôss and siŇč…ôr. sńß…ô ros…ô to fam…ô for ńß…ôr ror~…ĺ…ô as juan *iaŇč*in in tńß…ô taiwan…ôs…ô drama it start…ôd witńß a kiss (****) and tńß…ô ¶ńßin…ôs…ô fantasj drama tńß…ô r~…ĺittr~…ĺ…ô fairj (****). r~…ĺin won b…ôst a ¶tr…ôss at tńß…ô **rd and **tńß gor~…ĺd…ôn b…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ awards for ńß…ôr ror~…ĺ…ôs in tńß…ô kiss again (****) and in tim…ô witńß jou (****) r…ôsp…ô ¶ti*…ôr~…ĺj. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ***, .) namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan ***
S.FORM: Ariel Lin Ariel Lin u siwkay niza Ariel Lin (1982.10.29) tatayna, nalecuhan i Taywan. 2008 a mihcan nay "mibalakas micepcep 2"maala saka43 Cincung kawlah palaway ngatu tatayna a kawlah, u sakacacay maala nu kanamuhan a palaway. 2011.9 mipalaw tilibi a ngatu"caay kaku maidih tisuwan"singangantu. u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u kawlah niza u nasulitan nu Hulam atu Amilika Ariel Lin is a Taiwanese actress and singer. She rose to fame for her role as Yuan Xiangqin in the Taiwanese drama It Started with a Kiss (2005) and the Chinese fantasy drama The Little Fairy (2006). Lin won Best Actress at the 43rd and 47th Golden Bell Awards for her roles in They Kiss Again (2007) and In Time with You (2011) respectively. (u kamu nu Hulam: śěóšĺĚśô®, .) namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan śěóšĺĚśô®

(u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ***, .) namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan ***
